title: ononis reclinata proles mollis
intro: Ononis reclinata proles mollis, also known as the climbing restharrow or downy restharrow, is a perennial plant that belongs to the legume family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating urinary tract issues and inflammation. The plant is known to have anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and antiseptic properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections, kidney stones, and other related health issues. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential health benefits and optimal usage.
